name: Grapenuts Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Ground the Grape Nuts in a food processor.
2. Mix the Grape Nuts with half of the amount of apple juice concentrate.
3. Press the mixture into the pie pan.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. Bake crust for 10 minutes.
6. If using a cool filling, let it cool before adding the filling and baking as usual.
7. For pumpkin pie, add the filling and bake all at once.
